title_english: Hobu Chandra Raja Gobu Chandra Mantri
synopsis_text: A stranger named Gobuchandra tricks his way into becoming the Minister of Raja Hobuchandra, the king of Bombagarh, and turns the erstwhile happy kingdom into a sad state for his personal gain. How will the people of Bombagarh save themselves from this turmoil?

Rajesh struggles to accept his father’s corrupt ways and criminal past. But when his father unexpectedly stands by him in a time of need, Rajesh is torn between rejection and gratitude. Can he forgive the man he once condemned, or is the damage beyond repair? A gripping tale of family and morals.

Banku Babu, a strict and dominating figure at home, rules over his family—until an accident causes him to lose his memory. As the household tastes freedom for the first time, chaos and comedy follow. But will the old Banku Babu return, or has everything changed for good?

Mon Churi unfolds in a one-of-a-kind school for thieves, where small-time crooks Kartik and Ganesh train in the art of stealing. Their world turns upside down when they befriend an ambitious young man aiming to become a minister. A comic caper full of mischief, madness, and unexpected turns.

This satirical comedy takes a humorous yet hard-hitting look at gender inequality, domestic violence, and the everyday struggles women face. With wit and irony, it exposes deep-rooted societal norms while sparking thought and laughter in equal measure.

Abhijit falls deeply for Debjani, but their romance hits a rough patch when his growing jealousy over her close bond with Subhro spirals out of control. What begins as love slowly turns into obsession, leading to strained ties, painful choices, and a twist that changes everything.

A family reunites under the guise of celebrating Durga Puja, but beneath the festive lights lie hidden agendas, old grudges, and personal motives. As the days unfold, secrets spill and true intentions surface. A layered drama where tradition meets tension and nothing is as it seems.
actor_names: ["Prosenjit Chatterjee", "Rituparna Sengupta", "Mamata Shankar", "Madhabi Mukherjee", "Arpita Chatterjee", "Ratul Shankar"]

synopsis_text: Colonial oppression dictated that Indians couldn't play football in their own country. Nagendra Prasad Sarbadhikari challenged this norm and fought for football beyond caste, creed, and nationality. Watch the inspiring journey of the Father of Indian Football in Golondaaj, starring Dev.

After their father meets an accident, Chottu and Gopal's mother become unable to feed them. While Gopal takes multiple jobs to become a bread earner of the family, Chottu is dreaming to get invited to the grand Janmasthtami feast arranged by a local Brahmin household.

Swarnaja, a radio jockey, has a golden heart and 'golden blood'. When she receives a mysterious call from a child at her radio station, it hints at a dark truth that sets her up on a race to save her bloodline.
Tech-savvy Arjun gifts Kuheli a smartphone. But with every swipe, her reality begins to blur—pulling her deeper into illusion.

The world sees Bangshi as a Chaplin impersonator, but he sees himself as an artist whose entire life revolves around his son. Watch the journey of this father-son duo as they make the most of the little they have in the pursuit of happiness.

A young man moves to a big city with the dream of becoming an actor. But his dream quickly turns into a nightmare as life in the city throws one curveball after another. Will his ability to see things differently save him?
More than a century ago, a scientist invented a machine that could transport people to the world of dreams. What happens when a team of rogues set out to find that lost machine?
Music is Rono's escape from an overly demanding father and an emotionally distant family. Will he be able to fuel his passion in a city at the peak of the Naxalite movement?

Hiralal Sen, a pioneer of Indian cinema, began as a still photography enthusiast and created India's first ad film and political documentary. "Hiralal" tells the tragic yet inspiring story of a visionary filmmaker whose passion shaped the early days of Indian filmmaking.

When Dr. Bakshi' s son gets kidnapped, Siddharta and his team of private investigators look into the case. Is the kidnapping related to the series of recent murders in Kolkata? And how is maths teacher Sukumar Sen connected to all this?

What happens when you suddenly start receiving mysterious parcels containing seemingly ordinary gifts? 'The Parcel' is the story of Nandini and Souvik, whose blissful life gets stirred by parcels from an anonymous sender. Which dark secret threatens to unmask itself and turn everything upside down?
producer_names: ["Bhavna Aaj O Kaal", "Greentouch Entertainment Pvt Ltd"]

synopsis_text: After gaining fame with his band, Sanjib watches helplessly as his band sinks into oblivion. He forms a new band with a group of slum children. Joyee, a musician from Mumbai, becomes fascinated with the band and the unique lives of its members. Will she breathe fresh life into Sanjib's world?

Seven characters. One house. As five siblings reunite for Rashna’s wedding, long-buried secrets, sibling tensions, and unresolved pasts begin to surface. Will the big day bring joy—or a shocking revelation that changes everything?

synopsis_text: Anirban, an idealist professor, and Ira, a conservative hospitality professional, are happily married. However, something unusually strong seems to pull Ira towards Rudranshu. Tarikh explores life, death, love, and sacrifice through three contrasting worlds alives.
A unique love story between three small town friends. But things change as it is the same love that makes them closer and drift apart. What happens when a dog comes into their equation?

synopsis_text: Sougata retreats to Kusumpur seeking peace, but a mysterious village girl shakes his very sense of purpose and identity.

synopsis_text: In 1970s Kolkata, Amal, a school teacher with sharp, unusual canine teeth, meets Manjari, a resilient naxal widow. As their lives entwine, haunted by loss yet drawn to each other, love blossoms against the backdrop of political turmoil.

Nomadic Srikanto’s wanderings lead him to Rajlokhi, his childhood love, now the mistress of his travel companion, Hukumchand. As past and present collide, Srikanto grapples with love, betrayal, and the harsh realities of life. A tale of lost love and unexpected reunions unfolds.

synopsis_text: Dugga appears strong, but her real battle lies within. Can she defeat the inner demons that haunt her every waking thought?

During the lockdown, Sujata appears to be a cheerful housewife—despite being trapped with her abusive husband. But behind her calm smile lies a chilling mystery. Is her happiness real, or is something far darker simmering beneath the surface?
Two lovers separated by the Indo-Bangladesh border reunite on Dashami, the one day the partition melts away—for love.

Folklore researcher Sayantika stumbles upon a mysterious website and accidentally summons a demon, plunging her into a world of terror. As nightmares blur reality, she must confront the sinister entity while unraveling the ancient curse that binds it. A chilling tale of curiosity gone wrong.

In British India, detective Mahimchandra longs for a juicy case like in his favorite Western crime novels. But as he chases crimes that barely exist, chaos unfolds—on the streets, at home, and in his head! A tale of a man’s hilarious hunt for the perfect mystery.

Shantilal, a jarred weather reporter, discovers a startling secret about famous actress Nandita who is about to join politics. Shantilal turns detective and tries to uncover the buried truth that may give him his biggest headline yet!

synopsis_text: A lonely, despairing man clings to a dying art form, seeking solace and purpose. When an old chair unexpectedly becomes his companion, it opens the door to new connections and a renewed sense of life. A moving tale of resilience and rediscovery by Indraadip Das Gupta.

synopsis_text: Hasu's life revolves around his childhood friend Anish and the love of his life Kajol. When he decides to settle down, life takes an unexpected turn where the people around him are at stake.

synopsis_text: Investigative journalist Shivangi arrives in misty Kurseong to find a missing girl. But the girl's cellphone begins to reveal eerie, supernatural clues—pulling Shivangi into a world where the living and the dead share secrets no one was meant to uncover.

In "Love Aaj Kal Porshu", two strangers wake up each day with new identities, meeting and falling in love anew—unaware of their past encounters. Their evolving personas are part of a mysterious experiment. Sci-fi romance by Pratim D. Gupta on love across world of shifting realities.

Based on Satyajit Ray's iconic story, the genius scientist Professor Shanku and the clairvoyant Nakur Babu venture to São Paolo in search of the legendary city of El Dorado. Their journey turns perilous as mysteries unfold, testing Nakur’s uncanny foresight and Shanku’s scientific mind.
Trapped in a loveless marriage, a woman battles heartbreak, betrayal, and the weight of expectations. Can she reclaim her voice and break free from the cycle of suffering?

synopsis_text: In Abby Sen, Abir Chatterjee plays a science-loving TV producer stuck in 2013 Kolkata, struggling to keep a job. When he meets a quirky scientist with a time machine, Abby jumps at the chance to travel back to 1980, hoping for a simpler life. But the past isn't as easy as he imagined.

synopsis_text: Aparna Sen's "Ghawre Bairey Aaj" is a contemporary adaptation of Rabindranath Tagore's classic novel Ghare Baire. Set in present-day India, the film explores a complex love triangle involving Brinda, a young Dalit woman, her husband, Nikhilesh, and Sandip, a professor and Nikhilesh's friend.

An author’s quiet life turns chaotic when two mysterious sisters enter his home. What begins as companionship soon spirals into a twisted game of love, obsession, and identity. Is he caught in a sinister trap—or just a story he can’t control?

synopsis_text: This powerful documentary follows the inspiring journey of a transwoman who rose from a life of begging and relentless harassment to become a Lok Adalat judge. A story of courage, identity, and the unbreakable will to rewrite one’s destiny.

Directed by Srijit Mukherji, Gumnaami explores the mystery behind Netaji Subhas Chandra Bose’s disappearance through the Mukherjee Commission hearings. Starring Prosenjit Chatterjee, this National Award-winning film dives into truth, myths, and the nation's unanswered questions.

synopsis_text: A Bengali thriller about a former cop, a troubled housewife, and a cab driver in love, fighting the odds of the society. Watch Shaheb Bibi Golaam on hoichoi!
Lonely and bullied, a young woman finds comfort in an invisible friend. But is this companionship a blessing—or something else?
Parambrata gathers the storytellers who carry Kolkata forward—some inherit it, some build it, all of them honor it.
Journalist Anumita Sen lands in Rooppur Jail for murder, where a past event in the same jail hides a chilling secret.
Anumita discovers a link to her fiancé during Narayan Sanyal’s interview, moments before fate delivers a deadly twist.
At the hospital, Anumita learns she’s pregnant, as Arnab lies silent, holding a secret he never got to confess.
After recovering, Anumita resumes her investigation despite Narayan Sanyal’s threats, unaware that danger hides nearby.
Victor Pakrashi and Mili Mitra tighten their grip on Anumita, as threats grow darker and witnesses disappear one by one.
Anumita's life in jail turns into a nightmare with Ammijaan and Bilkish Begum’s torment, but an unexpected ally appears.
Can Anumita escape from jail and expose the truth, or will the shadows trap her forever?
Mahitoshbabu reveals his family's tiger-hunting legacy and challenges Feluda with a puzzle hiding, deeper jungle secret.
Feluda thinks over the riddle, meets a strange man, and as Torit Babu dies, a deeper jungle secret waits to be found.
Was it a tiger or murder? Is the riddle linked to Torit Babu’s death? What secret hides inside the mansion?
Feluda visits Mahitosh Singha Ray’s mansion with Topshe and Jatayu, but senses a hidden mystery in the jungle.
The sword is missing. Feluda finds clues from Torit’s room and Debotosh’s words. The riddle begins to unravel.
On the day Torit Babu died, someone fired in the jungle. Feluda wonders if it was connected to the hidden treasure.
Treasure found, killer beast appears. Feluda unravels Tarit's death and Mahitoshbabu's secret. Can he save them all?
Parambrata’s table gathers voices who live in Kolkata—its language, food, and habits—by instinct, not identity.
Parambrata’s table hosts voices shaping Kolkata, while carrying the city with them wherever they go.
After two killings, Maya tells Debi to escape the Roy Barman house before the next murder. Will Debi run or stay?
Debi witnesses a murder, the victim feels known. Elsewhere, a dangerous agreement is struck between Satyaki and Ajitesh.
Debi feels the danger before it strikes and sends Maya away. As Satyaki connects the dots, the night grows darker.
Ajitesh reveals the deal to this Father. Dark secrets shatter bonds. Debi confronts her past - and death draws closer.
Another death haunts the Roy Barman house - a punishment for old sins. Who’s guilty this time? Everyone…or Maya?
A shocking truth about Debi and Maya surfaces. Satyaki exposes Debi’s past and catches the killer, but is it truly over?
All secrets unravel, rooted deep in the Roy Barman past. But when the truth surfaces - who is finally unmasked?
A film crew meets three ghosts, one claims a human's baby as hers. Love, lies, and laughter haunt the entire shoot.
Ghosts fall in love, a dacoit wants revenge, and the crew films it all. The doc just turned into a ghost soap opera.
Ghost love grows, a loan haunts the living, and Kamalesh isn’t fully dead. What happens next?
Kamalesh picks ghost life, a blind spirit arrives for him, Jayanta confesses, and a ghost plans to eat the director.
Sukumari plots to unplug Kamalesh for eternal love, Jayanta tries to ghost, a ghost. The climax is dying to happen.
Six students visit Sonamukhi for research, but soon uncover the village is haunted by Nishi’s curse.
After a friend's death, they discover singing in the village is deadly, as Nishi had killed six musicians before.
One constable is dead. Five friends trapped in the night. And a room that holds their worst nightmare.
Nishi possesses Anirban, a mysterious old woman speaks to them, and Titli receives strange letters.
When Titli thinks of the village, the silence feels heavier as it still guards a story she was never meant to uncover.
A buried sin resurfaces. Will Nishi find peace, will her song meet its end, or will the curse remain unbroken?
Loknath kidnaps Mitul. Amiyo confronts Genu. Bhaduri Moshai discovers Loknath has learned to revive the dead.
Bhaduri Moshai seeks help from child spirits to locate Mitul. In a shelter, they discover Loknath's dark ritual.
Bhaduri Moshai is hurt in an accident as Amiyo is ambushed. Meanwhile, what deadly plan is Loknath setting in motion?
Mitul is bound by a spell. Bhaduri Moshai tracks Loknath’s old address, and uncovers a brutal secret.
As Loknath nears his final act, Titas locates Mitul. What price will she pay for defying Bhaduri Moshai?
The final clash of guru and disciple. What will be the outcome - who survives, and who is lost to the darkness?
After her husband's suicide, Nandita attends her mother-in-law's funeral where the family lawyer unveils a letter!
Inka is critically ill. The family wants to prove Nandita's late husband, Arnab, was illegitimate to throw them out.
Everyone suspects Poulomi and Arnab. Nandini visits Shaunak to claim her husband's share. Will this solve everything?
Unemployed, Nandita rejects her friend Debasish's help. A drunk Shaunak suddenly shows up at her doorstep.
Shaunak corners Nandita. Inka intervenes and saves her. Then a knock breaks the silence. Who has come?
Poulomi comes to Nandita's house. Debasish arrives at the same moment. Will Nandita manage to hide Shaunak?
Jhinuk secretly joins a cooking class, meets Shahana, and a joke about killing their husbands suddenly shifts the mood.
Jhinuk comes home to chaos, her husband is dead. Shahana casually claims the credit, and now says it’s Jhinuk’s turn!
Inspector Bhupen smells murder, Shahana haunts Jhinuk’s mind, and the warning is clear: act fast, or face trouble.
Sleeping pills emerge in Gopal’s post-mortem; as Jhinuk seaches for Shahana’s truth, Bhupen finds a new lead!
Shahana urges Jhinuk to finish the job quickly and kill Arjun. Jhinuk digs deeper, as Bhupen closes in.
The clock is ticking for Jhinuk when a chilling truth surfaces. And Bhupen? He’s watching her every move.
A secret explodes leaving everyone in shock. Is this the end for Jhinuk-Shahana? What's cooking in the finale?
Nandita finally gets a job. But her relief is short-lived, bank officials bring a notice, the police arrive with an FIR.
Nandita lands in jail, Shaunak planned everything. Debasish searches for help. Who will step up to rescue her?
Poulomi makes a shocking deal with Nandita. She offers help, but at what cost? What price will Nandita have to pay?
Poulomi confronts Shaunak about repaying Nandita. But she makes an unexpected move and cancels Poulomi's deal.
A new lawyer arrives at Nandita's with Shaunak's case. Meanwhile, the eldest son, Krishnendu, arranges a DNA test.
Nandita has no answers to Inka's questions. She ends up visiting every family member with a plot of her own.
After two killings, Maya tells Debi to escape the Roy Barman house before the next murder. Will Debi run or stay?
Debi witnesses a murder, the victim feels known. Elsewhere, a dangerous agreement is struck between Satyaki and Ajitesh.
